title: Three Miles Out
writer: John Emerson, Anita Loos, Neysa McMein
actors: Madge Kennedy, Harrison Ford, Marc McDermott
plot: Molly Townsend, engaged to Luis Riccardi, learns from Capt. John Locke half an hour before the wedding that Riccardi is a thief and a smuggler. Locke, Riccardi's rival for Molly, persuades Molly to sail away with him in his boat b...
